articles.title: After losing her brother to suicide, she’s running Boston to help others feel less alone
articles.description:
"Every step holds a memory of a life well lived, and one so incredibly missed."

The post After losing her brother to suicide, she’s running Boston to help others feel less alone appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Jen Hoye is running the Boston Marathon to honor her late brother who died by suicide.

Hoye's initiative encourages Boston residents to engage in conversations about mental health and suicide prevention.

articles.title: Hampshire College ‘hopes to live.’ Can it survive?
articles.description:
AMHERST — Abigail Crocker, a first-year student at Hampshire College, is starting to think about backup plans just in case her school shutters before she graduates. “I feel very confident that I could transfer, but I really like this school,” Crocker said. “I would be really sad if it didn’t hold out until my senior […]

The post Hampshire College ‘hopes to live.’ Can it survive? appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Hampshire College faces potential closure, affecting students like Abigail Crocker.
First-year students are considering transfer options amid uncertainty about the school's future.
Local community may lose a unique educational institution if Hampshire College shuts down.

articles.title: She’s running her fifth Boston Marathon in support of Dana-Farber
articles.description:

summary: Amanda Bathory runs her fifth Boston Marathon to support Dana-Farber Cancer Institute.
